nasb.text: But the land shall be divided by lot. They shall receive their inheritance according to the names of the tribes of their fathers.

esv.text: But the land shall be divided by lot. According to the names of the tribes of their fathers they shall inherit.

cnv.text: 雖然這樣，地還是要藉著抽籤分配；他們要按著自己父家支派的名字，承受產業。

ccb.text: 以色列人要按各自的支派抽签分地，承受产业。
